description: Down at the temple, FitzSimmons, Piper, and Flint open the pod to discover Fitz and Simmons' young daughter, Alya, inside. The emotional reunion is filled with joy, relief, and surprise as they celebrate their family finally being together after years apart, closing the familial circle that drove their sacrifice.
location: Temple (Izel's gateway / portal site in the western United States)

transcript.line: Okay, that was a neat trick.
But how did you... What the hell, man?! We were scared out of our minds. Are you saying that we were guarding this thing for nothing?
No. You were guarding our everything.
Nothing, sweet girl. Nothing. I'm sorry. I'm sorry.
You said you would be gone for a long time, but that wasn't long.
I was only a little scared.
